title: Revitalization of groundnut production in West and Central Africa: partnership between ICRISAT, the CFC, FAO, NARS and CIRAD.
abstract: This paper covers germplasm assembly, maintenance and conservation; evaluation and diffusion of selected germplasm and improved groundnut cultivars; foundation seed multiplication, strengthening national research and development capacity and groundnut technology dissemination as part of the revitalization of groundnut production in West and Central Africa.
